tasks.title: Create billing_addon_purchases DB schema with Drizzle
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/schemas/billing/billing_addon_purchase.dbschema.ts` with the billing_addon_purchases table definition. Columns: id (uuid PK), customer_id (FK billing_customers), subscription_id (uuid nullable), addon_slug (varchar 100), addon_id (uuid nullable), status (varchar 50 default 'pending'), purchased_at (timestamptz), expires_at (timestamptz nullable), cancelled_at (timestamptz nullable), payment_id (varchar 255 nullable), limit_adjustments (jsonb), entitlement_adjustments (jsonb), metadata (jsonb), created_at, updated_at. Add indexes on: customer_id, addon_slug, status, expires_at, (customer_id, status), (customer_id, addon_slug). Follow QZPay convention using varchar for status (not pgEnum). Add relations to billingCustomers.

tasks.title: Create billing_notification_log DB schema with Drizzle
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/schemas/billing/billing_notification_log.dbschema.ts` with the billing_notification_log table. Columns: id (uuid PK), customer_id (uuid nullable), type (varchar 100), channel (varchar 50), recipient (varchar 255), subject (varchar 500), template_id (varchar 100 nullable), status (varchar 50 default 'queued'), sent_at (timestamptz nullable), error_message (text nullable), metadata (jsonb), created_at (timestamptz). Add indexes on: customer_id, type, status, created_at, (customer_id, type). Create barrel file `packages/db/src/schemas/billing/index.ts` exporting both new schemas. Update `packages/db/src/schemas/index.ts` to re-export from billing/.

tasks.title: Generate and apply DB migration for new billing tables
tasks.description: Run `cd packages/db && pnpm db:generate` to create the migration SQL for billing_addon_purchases and billing_notification_log tables. Review the generated SQL file in packages/db/src/migrations/. Apply the migration with `cd packages/db && pnpm db:migrate`. Verify both tables exist with correct columns and indexes.

tasks.title: Create data migration script: addon JSON to billing_addon_purchases
tasks.description: Create a migration script (SQL or TypeScript) that reads existing addon adjustments from `billing_subscriptions.metadata.addonAdjustments` (JSON string inside JSONB) and inserts them as proper rows into `billing_addon_purchases`. Handle: parsing the JSON string, mapping addonSlug/limitKey/entitlement fields to proper columns, setting status='active', computing expires_at based on durationDays from addon config, marking migrated entries in metadata. Script must be idempotent (safe to re-run). Add a `migratedFrom: 'subscription_metadata'` entry in metadata column.

tasks.title: Create @repo/notifications package scaffold
tasks.description: Create the `packages/notifications/` package with: package.json (@repo/notifications, dependencies: resend, @react-email/components, react, @repo/config, @repo/logger, @repo/db, ioredis), tsup.config.ts, tsconfig.json. Create directory structure: src/index.ts, src/types/ (notification.types.ts with NotificationType enum and all payload interfaces, preferences.types.ts with NotificationPreferences, delivery.types.ts with DeliveryResult/DeliveryStatus), src/config/ (notification-categories.ts mapping types to categories transactional/reminder/admin, resend.config.ts with Resend client factory), src/constants/ (notification.constants.ts with retry limits, default sender, timeouts). All barrel files. Add to pnpm-workspace.yaml if needed. Run pnpm install.

tasks.title: Implement Resend email transport with EmailTransport interface
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/src/transports/email/email-transport.interface.ts` with EmailTransport interface (send method accepting to, subject, react component, from, replyTo, tags). Create `packages/notifications/src/transports/email/resend-transport.ts` implementing EmailTransport using Resend SDK. Handle: API key from config, error wrapping, message ID extraction from response. Create barrel file for transports. Add a mock transport for testing.

tasks.title: Create cron system scaffold in apps/api
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/cron/` directory with: types.ts, middleware.ts, registry.ts, routes.ts, bootstrap.ts, index.ts barrel. Mount cron routes at /api/v1/cron in apps/api/src/routes/index.ts.

tasks.title: Add new environment variables to .env.example and config
tasks.description: Add env vars to .env.example: RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_FROM_EMAIL, RESEND_FROM_NAME, RESEND_REPLY_TO, ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_EMAILS, CRON_SECRET, CRON_ADAPTER, CRON_AUTH_DISABLED. Update @repo/config with Zod validation. Add node-cron dependencies.

tasks.title: Refactor applyAddonEntitlements() to write to billing_addon_purchases
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/services/addon-entitlement.service.ts`, refactor the applyAddonEntitlements() method to create a row in billing_addon_purchases table with status='active', limit_adjustments, entitlement_adjustments, and computed expires_at (purchased_at + durationDays). Keep backward compatibility: still write to JSON metadata during transition period.

tasks.title: Refactor removeAddonEntitlements() to update billing_addon_purchases status
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/services/addon-entitlement.service.ts`, refactor removeAddonEntitlements() to update the billing_addon_purchases row status to 'cancelled' and set cancelled_at timestamp, instead of only modifying JSON metadata.

tasks.title: Refactor getCustomerAddonAdjustments() to query billing_addon_purchases
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/services/addon-entitlement.service.ts`, refactor getCustomerAddonAdjustments() to query billing_addon_purchases WHERE customer_id AND status='active'. Add backward compat fallback: read from JSON metadata as secondary source during transition period. Ensure returned data shape is compatible with existing consumers.

tasks.title: Refactor AddonService.confirmPurchase() to insert into billing_addon_purchases
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/services/addon.service.ts`, refactor confirmPurchase() to insert a new row into billing_addon_purchases (with customer_id, addon_slug, status='active', purchased_at, limit_adjustments, entitlement_adjustments) instead of only writing to JSON metadata. Maintain backward compat writing both sources during transition.

tasks.title: Refactor AddonService.getCustomerAddons() to query billing_addon_purchases
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/services/addon.service.ts`, refactor getCustomerAddons() to query billing_addon_purchases WHERE customer_id AND status='active'. Maintain backward compat reading both sources during transition.

tasks.title: Refactor AddonService.cancelAddon() to update billing_addon_purchases status
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/services/addon.service.ts`, refactor cancelAddon() to update billing_addon_purchases.status='cancelled' and set cancelled_at timestamp. listAvailableAddons() remains unchanged (reads from config). Maintain backward compat.

tasks.title: Create AddonExpirationService query methods (findExpired, findExpiring)
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/services/addon-expiration.service.ts` with: findExpiredAddons() - query billing_addon_purchases WHERE status='active' AND expires_at <= now(). findExpiringAddons(daysAhead: number) - find add-ons expiring within N days (for notifications). Both methods return typed arrays. Handle edge cases: null expires_at means no expiration.

tasks.title: Create AddonExpirationService batch processing (expireAddon, processExpiredAddons)
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/services/addon-expiration.service.ts`, add: expireAddon(purchaseId) - call AddonEntitlementService.removeAddonEntitlements(), update status to 'expired'. processExpiredAddons() - batch process all expired add-ons (limit 100 per batch). All methods must be idempotent and handle concurrent execution safely (already expired add-on is skipped).

tasks.title: Create UsageTrackingService
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/services/usage-tracking.service.ts` with: getUsageSummary(customerId), checkUsageThreshold(customerId, limitKey), getUsageForLimit(customerId, limitKey). Thresholds: ok (<80%), warning (80-89%), critical (90-99%), exceeded (100%).

tasks.title: Create subject-builder.ts with notification type to subject mapping
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/src/utils/subject-builder.ts` mapping each NotificationType to a subject line pattern (all in Spanish). Examples: PURCHASE_CONFIRMATION -> 'Confirmacion de compra - {planName}', PAYMENT_SUCCESS -> 'Pago recibido - ${amount}', ADDON_EXPIRATION_WARNING -> 'Tu add-on {addonName} expira pronto', etc. Export a getSubject(type, data) function. Cover all notification types defined in notification.types.ts.

tasks.title: Create NotificationService.send() core orchestration
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/src/services/notification.service.ts` with the send(payload: NotificationPayload) method: 1) Check if notification type is transactional (always send) or reminder (check preferences via PreferenceService), 2) Build email subject via subject-builder, 3) Select and render the correct React Email template based on type, 4) Send via EmailTransport, 5) Log to billing_notification_log table. On failure, queue for retry via RetryService.

tasks.title: Create NotificationService.sendBatch() and wire error handling
tasks.description: In `packages/notifications/src/services/notification.service.ts`, add sendBatch(payloads[]) method that sends multiple notifications with proper error isolation (one failure doesn't stop others). Ensure retry queueing works correctly for failed items. Export NotificationService from package index. Wire up barrel files.

tasks.title: Create PreferenceService for notification opt-in/opt-out
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/src/services/preference.service.ts` with: getPreferences(userId), updatePreferences(userId, preferences), shouldSendNotification(userId, notificationType). Default preferences: all enabled.

tasks.title: Create RetryService with Redis-backed queue
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/src/services/retry.service.ts` with: enqueue(), dequeueReady(), processRetries(). Retry strategy: exponential backoff (1min, 5min, 30min), max 3 attempts. Graceful degradation when Redis unavailable.

tasks.title: Create shared email layout component with React Email
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/src/templates/components/layout.tsx` - shared email layout using @react-email/components. Include brand header, typography, colors, responsive design, footer. Create helper components: button.tsx, heading.tsx, info-row.tsx. All text in Spanish.

tasks.title: Create purchase-confirmation and payment-success email templates
tasks.description: Create React Email templates in `packages/notifications/src/templates/billing/`: purchase-confirmation.tsx (plan name, amount, currency, billing period, next billing date, CTA to dashboard) and payment-success.tsx (amount, payment method, receipt reference). Both use shared layout. All text in Spanish.

tasks.title: Create payment-failure and renewal-reminder email templates
tasks.description: Create React Email templates in `packages/notifications/src/templates/billing/`: payment-failure.tsx (amount, failure reason, retry date, CTA to update payment method) and renewal-reminder.tsx (plan name, amount, renewal date, CTA to manage subscription). Both use shared layout. All text in Spanish.

tasks.title: Create plan-change-confirmation email template and billing barrel
tasks.description: Create React Email template in `packages/notifications/src/templates/billing/`: plan-change-confirmation.tsx (old plan -> new plan, effective date, new amount). Uses shared layout. All text in Spanish. Create barrel file `packages/notifications/src/templates/billing/index.ts` exporting all 5 billing templates.

tasks.title: Create addon-expiration-warning email template
tasks.description: Create React Email template in `packages/notifications/src/templates/addon/`: addon-expiration-warning.tsx (addon name, days remaining, expiration date, CTA to renew). Uses shared layout. All text in Spanish.

tasks.title: Create addon-expired and addon-renewal-confirmation email templates
tasks.description: Create React Email templates in `packages/notifications/src/templates/addon/`: addon-expired.tsx (addon name, what was lost, CTA to repurchase) and addon-renewal-confirmation.tsx (addon name, amount, next renewal date). Create barrel file for addon templates. All use shared layout. All text in Spanish.

tasks.title: Create trial email templates (ending reminder, expired)
tasks.description: Create React Email templates in `packages/notifications/src/templates/trial/`: trial-ending-reminder.tsx (plan name, days remaining, trial end date, CTA to upgrade with pricing link), trial-expired.tsx (plan name, what features were lost, CTA to subscribe). Create barrel file. All use shared layout. All text in Spanish.

tasks.title: Create admin email templates (payment failure alert, system event)
tasks.description: Create React Email templates in `packages/notifications/src/templates/admin/`: admin-payment-failure.tsx (affected user email, user ID, customer ID, amount, failure reason, severity badge), admin-system-event.tsx (event type, severity, details summary, affected resources). Different styling: utilitarian design with severity-based color coding (info=blue, warning=yellow, critical=red). Create barrel file. All use shared layout. All text in Spanish.

tasks.title: Wire webhook handler to persist events to billing_webhook_events on receipt
tasks.description: Modify `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago.ts` to persist every received webhook to QZPay's billing_webhook_events table BEFORE processing. On webhook receipt, insert row with provider='mercadopago', type=event.type, provider_event_id from headers/body, status='pending', payload=raw body. Use the QZPay billing adapter for table access.

tasks.title: Update webhook event status after processing (success/failure)
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago.ts`, after processing a webhook event: update billing_webhook_events status to 'processed' with processed_at timestamp on success. On processing error, update status to 'failed' with error message. Ensure error in status update doesn't break the main handler flow.

tasks.title: Add idempotency check to webhook handler
tasks.description: Enhance `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago.ts` to check for duplicate webhook events before processing. Before inserting to billing_webhook_events, query by provider_event_id. If already exists with status='processed', return 200 OK immediately (skip processing). If exists with status='failed', allow reprocessing. Add appropriate logging for skipped duplicates.

tasks.title: Add webhook health monitoring endpoint
tasks.description: Create `GET /api/v1/webhooks/health` endpoint in `apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/index.ts`. Returns: total events last 24h, events by status (processed/failed/pending), last event timestamp, dead letter queue count, average processing time. Query billing_webhook_events and billing_webhook_dead_letter tables. Protected by admin auth or CRON_SECRET.

tasks.title: Add addon purchase confirmation notification to webhook handler
tasks.description: In the MercadoPago webhook handler, after AddonService.confirmPurchase() succeeds: send ADDON_PURCHASE notification via NotificationService. Use fire-and-forget pattern (don't await notification, catch errors silently, the retry service handles failures). Import NotificationService from @repo/notifications.

tasks.title: Add payment success/failure notifications to webhook handler
tasks.description: In the MercadoPago webhook handler: after subscription payment succeeds, send PAYMENT_SUCCESS notification. On payment failure, send PAYMENT_FAILURE to user + ADMIN_PAYMENT_FAILURE to admin list. Use fire-and-forget pattern for all notifications.

tasks.title: Integrate notifications into trial service (trial ending/expired)
tasks.description: Modify `apps/api/src/services/trial.service.ts`: In blockExpiredTrials(), after blocking a trial, send TRIAL_EXPIRED notification to the user. Create a new method findTrialsEndingSoon(daysAhead: number) that queries trials expiring within N days. This method will be called by the notification-schedule cron job.

tasks.title: Create user usage tracking API endpoints
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/routes/billing/usage.ts` with: GET /api/v1/billing/usage - returns current user's usage summary (all limits with current/max/percentage/threshold). GET /api/v1/billing/usage/:limitKey - returns detailed usage for a specific limit. Both endpoints use UsageTrackingService. User endpoints require auth (extract customerId from billing context). Response includes upgrade URL when approaching limits.

tasks.title: Create admin usage tracking API endpoint
tasks.description: Add to `apps/api/src/routes/billing/usage.ts`: GET /api/v1/admin/billing/usage/:customerId - admin endpoint to view any customer's usage. Requires admin role. Uses UsageTrackingService.getUsageSummary(customerId). Mount admin route in admin route group.

tasks.title: Add enforcement for remaining limits (MAX_FAVORITES, MAX_PROPERTIES, MAX_STAFF_ACCOUNTS)
tasks.description: Update `apps/api/src/middlewares/limit-enforcement.ts` to add enforcement for remaining limits: MAX_FAVORITES, MAX_PROPERTIES, MAX_STAFF_ACCOUNTS. Currently only accommodations, photos, promotions are enforced. Follow the same pattern used for existing limits.

tasks.title: Add X-Usage-Warning response headers and enhanced 403 response
tasks.description: Update `apps/api/src/middlewares/limit-enforcement.ts` to: 1) Add X-Usage-Warning response header when usage is at warning (80%+) or critical (90%+) threshold. Header format: 'X-Usage-Warning: limitKey=MAX_ACCOMMODATIONS;usage=4;max=5;threshold=critical'. 2) Include usage percentage in 403 response body. Update `apps/api/src/utils/limit-check.ts` to add threshold calculation functions.

tasks.title: Create trial-expiry cron job
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/cron/jobs/trial-expiry.job.ts` implementing CronJobDefinition. Handler calls existing TrialService.blockExpiredTrials(). Schedule: '0 5 * * *' (5:00 UTC = 2:00 AM Argentina). Timeout: 60s. Returns CronJobResult with count of blocked trials. Add to registry in cron/registry.ts. Support dryRun mode.

tasks.title: Create addon-expiry cron job
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/cron/jobs/addon-expiry.job.ts` implementing CronJobDefinition. Handler calls AddonExpirationService.processExpiredAddons() to find and expire overdue add-ons. Also calls findExpiringAddons(3) and findExpiringAddons(1) and triggers ADDON_EXPIRATION_WARNING notifications for each. Schedule: '0 5 * * *'. Timeout: 120s. Add to registry.

tasks.title: Create notification-schedule cron job for trial and addon reminders
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/cron/jobs/notification-schedule.job.ts` implementing CronJobDefinition. Handler: 1) Find trials ending in 3 days -> send TRIAL_ENDING_REMINDER. 2) Find trials ending in 1 day -> send TRIAL_ENDING_REMINDER. 3) Find subscriptions renewing in 3 days -> send RENEWAL_REMINDER. Track sent notifications by idempotency key to avoid duplicates. Schedule: '0 8 * * *' (8:00 UTC = 5:00 AM Argentina).

tasks.title: Add retry queue processing to notification-schedule cron job
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/cron/jobs/notification-schedule.job.ts`, add step 4: Process retry queue via RetryService.processRetries(). Add to cron registry. Finalize the job handler return with total counts (reminders sent, retries processed).

tasks.title: Create webhook-retry cron job
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/cron/jobs/webhook-retry.job.ts` implementing CronJobDefinition. Handler: Query billing_webhook_dead_letter for unresolved events. For each, re-attempt processing by calling the webhook handler logic. Update status on success or increment attempts on failure. After 5 failed attempts, mark as permanently failed and alert admin. Schedule: '0 */1 * * *' (every hour). Add to registry.

tasks.title: Wire cron bootstrap into API server startup
tasks.description: Update `apps/api/src/index.ts` to call startCronScheduler(port) after the server starts listening. Only call when NODE_ENV !== 'test'. Import from './cron/bootstrap'. Add vercel.json cron configuration example. Verify that CRON_ADAPTER=none doesn't start any scheduler. Test that CRON_ADAPTER=node-cron starts scheduling.

tasks.title: Build Active Add-ons widget for web dashboard
tasks.description: Create `apps/web/src/components/dashboard/ActiveAddons.tsx` React component. Shows a list of the user's active add-ons fetched from GET /api/v1/billing/addons/mine. Each add-on card shows: name, description, status badge (active=green, expiring-soon=yellow, expired=gray), expiration date, cancel button, renew button. Use TanStack Query for data fetching. Handle loading and empty states. Responsive design.

tasks.title: Build Usage Meters component with progress bars
tasks.description: Create `apps/web/src/components/dashboard/UsageMeters.tsx` React component. Shows progress bars for each limit the user has. Fetches from GET /api/v1/billing/usage. Each meter shows: limit name (Spanish), progress bar (green <80%, yellow 80-89%, orange 90-99%, red 100%), text showing 'X / Y used', upgrade CTA when approaching/at limit. Accessible patterns: both color AND text indicators. Handle zero limits (show 'Unlimited' or hide).

tasks.title: Build Add-on Management page layout with list and filtering
tasks.description: Create or enhance add-on management page at `apps/web/src/pages/mi-cuenta/addons.astro` with a React island component `AddonManagement.tsx`. Features: list all add-ons (active, expired, cancelled) with tabs/filters, basic card display for each add-on. Use TanStack Query for data fetching.

tasks.title: Add addon detail view, cancel/renew actions, and purchase section
tasks.description: In `AddonManagement.tsx`, add: detail view per add-on (purchase date, expiry, adjustments applied), cancel action with confirmation dialog, renew/repurchase action that redirects to checkout, purchase new add-ons section listing available add-ons with pricing.

tasks.title: Build Billing History component for web dashboard
tasks.description: Create `apps/web/src/components/dashboard/BillingHistory.tsx` React component. Shows a chronological list of billing events: payments, subscription changes, add-on purchases, invoices. Each entry shows: date, description, amount, status badge. Pagination with load-more or infinite scroll. Filter by type. Link to download invoice PDF (if available).

tasks.title: Enhance /mi-cuenta page integrating dashboard widgets
tasks.description: Update `apps/web/src/pages/mi-cuenta/suscripcion.astro` to integrate the new dashboard widgets. Layout: subscription status card (existing) at top, then Usage Meters, then Active Add-ons, then Billing History. Ensure all components are wrapped in React islands with proper hydration. Add navigation between /mi-cuenta/suscripcion and /mi-cuenta/addons pages. Handle unauthenticated state.

tasks.title: Create admin Billing Add-ons table with columns and data fetching
tasks.description: Implement the admin billing add-ons feature in `apps/admin/src/features/billing-addons/`. Replace stub/mock data with real API calls to admin endpoints. Create TanStack Table with columns: customer email, addon slug, status, purchased_at, expires_at, payment_id. Wire up to existing admin page at `apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/billing/addons.tsx`.

tasks.title: Add filters and row actions to admin Billing Add-ons table
tasks.description: In the admin billing add-ons table, add: filters for status and addon type. Row actions: view details (drawer/modal), force-expire, force-activate. Confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.

tasks.title: Create admin Usage Analytics customer search and usage display
tasks.description: Implement the admin billing metrics feature in `apps/admin/src/features/billing-metrics/`. Replace stub data with real API calls. Show: customer search input, selected customer's usage summary (all limits with progress bars). Wire up to existing page at `apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/billing/metrics.tsx`.

tasks.title: Add system-wide usage statistics and approaching-limits overview
tasks.description: In admin billing metrics, add: overview of customers approaching limits (>90%), system-wide usage statistics (total customers per plan, average usage per limit). Summary cards at the top of the page.

tasks.title: Create admin notification log API endpoint
tasks.description: Create new admin API endpoint: GET /api/v1/admin/notifications?type=&status=&limit=&offset=. Queries billing_notification_log table with filtering by type, status, date range. Returns paginated results with total count. Protected by admin auth. Mount in admin routes.

tasks.title: Create admin Notification Log UI viewer with table and filters
tasks.description: Create a notification log viewer in admin panel. TanStack Table showing billing_notification_log rows: timestamp, type, recipient, subject, status, channel. Filters: by type, status, date range. Detail drawer showing full metadata and error messages for failed notifications.

tasks.title: Create admin webhook event API endpoints
tasks.description: Create admin API endpoints for webhook events: GET /api/v1/admin/webhooks/events?status=&type=&limit=&offset= querying billing_webhook_events, GET /api/v1/admin/webhooks/dead-letter querying billing_webhook_dead_letter, POST /api/v1/admin/webhooks/dead-letter/:id/retry to manually retry a dead letter event. Protected by admin auth.

tasks.title: Create admin Webhook Event UI viewer with dead letter queue tab
tasks.description: Create a webhook event viewer in admin panel. TanStack Table showing billing_webhook_events: timestamp, provider, type, status, provider_event_id. Filters: by status, type, date range. Detail drawer showing full payload JSON. Dead letter queue tab showing failed events with retry action button.

tasks.title: Add admin cron job management panel
tasks.description: Create a cron jobs admin panel (new route or section in billing settings). Shows: all registered jobs with name, description, schedule, enabled status. For each job: last execution time, last result. Manual trigger button calling POST /api/v1/cron/:jobName with admin auth. Support dryRun toggle. Requires GET /api/v1/cron endpoint access from admin.

tasks.title: Unit tests: AddonExpirationService
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/test/services/addon-expiration.service.test.ts`. Test cases: findExpiredAddons returns only active add-ons past expires_at, expireAddon removes entitlements and updates status, processExpiredAddons handles batch processing (0, 1, many), processExpiredAddons is idempotent (already expired skipped), findExpiringAddons(3) returns correct add-ons, error handling when AddonEntitlementService fails. Mock database queries and AddonEntitlementService. 90%+ coverage.

tasks.title: Unit tests: UsageTrackingService
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/test/services/usage-tracking.service.test.ts`. Test cases: getUsageSummary returns all limits with correct percentages, thresholds calculated correctly (ok/warning/critical/exceeded at exact boundaries), handles customers with no limits (free plan), handles zero max (unlimited), checkUsageThreshold returns correct status, getUsageForLimit decomposes plan base vs addon bonus. Mock database queries. 90%+ coverage.

tasks.title: Unit tests: NotificationService
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/test/services/notification.service.test.ts`. Test cases: send() calls transport and logs to DB, send() skips reminder when user opted out, send() always sends transactional even if preferences say no, send() queues retry on transport failure, sendBatch() processes all items with error isolation. Mock EmailTransport and DB. 90%+ coverage.

tasks.title: Unit tests: PreferenceService
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/test/services/preference.service.test.ts`. Test cases: getPreferences returns defaults for new user, updatePreferences saves correctly, shouldSendNotification respects category rules (transactional always, reminder checks prefs, admin always). Mock DB. 90%+ coverage.

tasks.title: Unit tests: RetryService
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/test/services/retry.service.test.ts`. Test cases: enqueue adds item to Redis sorted set with correct score, dequeueReady returns items past current time, processRetries re-sends dequeued items, exponential backoff calculates correct delays (1m, 5m, 30m), max attempts reached marks as permanently failed, graceful degradation when Redis unavailable, processRetries is idempotent. Mock ioredis. 90%+ coverage.

tasks.title: Unit tests: Email template rendering
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/test/templates/` with tests for each template category. Test that: all templates render without errors, templates include required fields from payload, shared layout is used correctly, CTA buttons have correct hrefs, Spanish text is correct, templates handle missing optional fields gracefully. Use @react-email/render. Test at least 1 template per category (billing, addon, trial, admin).

tasks.title: Integration tests: Cron routes and auth middleware
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/test/cron/cron-routes.test.ts`. Test cases: POST /api/v1/cron/:jobName with valid CRON_SECRET returns 200, POST without secret returns 401, POST with invalid secret returns 401, POST with unknown job name returns 404, POST to disabled job returns 400, GET /api/v1/cron returns job list, dryRun query param works, job timeout produces error response, CRON_AUTH_DISABLED=true bypasses auth. Use Hono test utilities.

tasks.title: Integration tests: Webhook event persistence
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/test/integration/webhooks/webhook-persistence.test.ts`. Test cases: Webhook receipt creates billing_webhook_events row, successful processing updates status to 'processed', failed processing updates status to 'failed' with error, webhook health endpoint returns correct statistics. Use actual DB (test database) with transaction rollback.

tasks.title: Integration tests: Webhook idempotency and dead letter queue
tasks.description: Add to webhook persistence tests: duplicate provider_event_id is detected and skipped (returns 200), dead letter queue receives failed events after max retries. Test idempotency with concurrent duplicate events. Use actual DB with transaction rollback.

tasks.title: Integration tests: Usage tracking API endpoints
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/test/integration/usage-tracking.test.ts`. Test cases: GET /api/v1/billing/usage returns correct summary for authenticated user, returns 401 for unauthenticated, threshold levels are correct at boundaries, GET /api/v1/billing/usage/:limitKey returns single limit, admin endpoint returns any customer's usage, X-Usage-Warning header is set when approaching limits, 403 at 100% includes usage info.

tasks.title: Integration tests: Addon purchase flow and table creation
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/test/integration/addon-expiration-flow.test.ts`. Test steps: 1) Create a billing customer + subscription. 2) Purchase a time-limited add-on (visibility-boost-7d). 3) Verify billing_addon_purchases row created with correct expires_at. 4) Verify entitlement granted. Use actual DB with transaction rollback.

tasks.title: Integration tests: Addon expiration via cron and notification logging
tasks.description: Continue addon-expiration-flow tests: 5) Manually set expires_at to past. 6) Run addon-expiry cron job handler. 7) Verify add-on status updated to 'expired'. 8) Verify entitlement removed. 9) Verify notification logged in billing_notification_log. Use actual DB with transaction rollback.

tasks.title: Integration tests: Notification send, log, and retry pipeline
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/test/integration/notification-pipeline.test.ts`. Test: 1) NotificationService.send() with mock transport -> verify log entry created. 2) Send with transport failure -> verify retry queued in Redis. 3) RetryService.processRetries() -> verify re-send attempted. 4) Idempotency: sending same notification twice -> only one log entry.

tasks.title: Integration tests: Notification preferences and admin delivery
tasks.description: Continue notification pipeline tests: 5) Send reminder to user who opted out -> verify skipped with reason logged. 6) Send transactional to opted-out user -> verify sent anyway. 7) Send admin notification -> verify sent to ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_EMAILS list.

tasks.title: Document cron system setup (Vercel + VPS)
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/docs/cron-system.md` documenting: architecture overview, CRON_ADAPTER config per environment, CRON_SECRET setup, vercel.json example, how to add a new cron job, how to test manually, monitoring and troubleshooting guide, all registered jobs.

tasks.title: Document notification system (types, templates, preferences)
tasks.description: Create `packages/notifications/README.md` documenting: package overview, notification types and categories, template list with preview instructions, how to add a new notification type, preference system, retry mechanism, environment variables, integration guide, admin notification configuration.

tasks.title: Update billing API endpoints documentation
tasks.description: Update `apps/api/docs/billing-api-endpoints.md` to include all new endpoints: usage tracking, admin usage, webhook health, cron endpoints, admin notifications. Document request/response shapes, auth requirements, error codes, and example requests.
